Use of Concept: Non-Active Battery Materials

Creator

Description

This is the non-active battery materials which can include sheet metal, computer chips, wires, and others, depending on if cells or modules are shredded.

Owning Diagram Recycle

ICOM Details:

  • Output on Activity A331 Pretreat Battery.
  • Tunneled Concept in Diagram.
  • Joins into Battery Materials
